violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the cafeteria, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2026
The steam hot hold unit located in the kitchen area was not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good condition or removed from establishment. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2026

The floor in the cafeteria area, and storage closet has an accumulation of soil residue, rodent droppings and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Establishment is to clean and sanitize any and all droppings using appropriate means of cleaning and sanitizing. Establishment is to continue to work with pest control to eliminate rodent activity. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the blower fan guards in the walk in cooler have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. NFCS must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2025

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025
The second cold well of the serving line located in the kitchen area was not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2025

The pre-flush spray hose at the Dishwasher is hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2024
Pipe coating located at the dishwasher is not in good repair. Coating around the pipe is peeling and can result in physical contamination of food equipment. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024
The mixer located in the kitchen area was not in good repair. Equipment shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/28/2023
